Container.Name: Rackpad
Container.Overview:
Rackpad is a self-hosted infrastructure inventory and operations workspace for homelabs, small racks, network rooms, and lab environments. It brings racks, devices, ports, cables, VLANs, IPAM, WiFi, compute, discovery, monitoring, docs, images, labs, and an admin area into one clean app.
On first start, open the web UI and create the initial administrator account.
https://github.com/Kobii-git/rackpad
https://rackpad.co.za/

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Rackpad web interface

Config.Name: AppData
Config.Description: Persistent Rackpad SQLite database and uploaded content

Config.Name: NODE_ENV
Config.Description: Application environment

Config.Name: HOST
Config.Description: Bind address inside the container

Config.Name: PORT
Config.Description: Internal Rackpad port

Config.Name: DATABASE_PATH
Config.Description: SQLite database path inside the container

Config.Name: MONITOR_INTERVAL_MS
Config.Description: Background health-check loop interval in milliseconds

Config.Name: TRUST_PROXY
Config.Description: Set to 1 when Rackpad is behind a reverse proxy

Config.Name: TRUSTED_HOSTS
Config.Description: Optional comma-separated public hostnames Rackpad should trust

Config.Name: TRUSTED_ORIGINS
Config.Description: Optional comma-separated public origins Rackpad should trust

Config.Name: APP_URL
Config.Description: Public Rackpad URL, required for OIDC and recommended behind a reverse proxy

Config.Name: OIDC_ENABLED
Config.Description: Set to 1 to enable OIDC sign-in

Config.Name: OIDC_ISSUER_URL
Config.Description: OIDC issuer URL

Config.Name: OIDC_CLIENT_ID
Config.Description: OIDC client ID

Config.Name: OIDC_CLIENT_SECRET
Config.Description: OIDC client secret

Config.Name: OIDC_REDIRECT_URI
Config.Description: Optional explicit OIDC callback URL

Config.Name: OIDC_LABEL
Config.Description: Label shown on the OIDC sign-in button

Config.Name: OIDC_DEFAULT_ROLE
Config.Description: Default role for new OIDC users

Config.Name: OIDC_DEBUG
Config.Description: Set to 1 temporarily to log OIDC troubleshooting details

Config.Name: OIDC_ADMIN_USERS
Config.Description: Optional comma-separated usernames that should get the admin role

Config.Name: OIDC_EDITOR_USERS
Config.Description: Optional comma-separated usernames that should get the editor role

Config.Name: OIDC_VIEWER_USERS
Config.Description: Optional comma-separated usernames that should get the viewer role

Config.Name: OIDC_ADMIN_GROUPS
Config.Description: Optional comma-separated group names that should get the admin role

Config.Name: OIDC_EDITOR_GROUPS
Config.Description: Optional comma-separated group names that should get the editor role

Config.Name: OIDC_VIEWER_GROUPS
Config.Description: Optional comma-separated group names that should get the viewer role

Config.Name: OUI_AUTO_UPDATE
Config.Description: Set to 0 to disable MAC vendor OUI auto updates

Config.Name: DISCOVERY_MAC_SCAN_MODE
Config.Description: MAC discovery mode: auto, neighbor, arp-scan, nmap, or off
